seo.title: Contact AQ Marketing — Free Local SEO Audit for MA Small Businesses
seo.description: Book a free Local SEO audit with AQ Marketing. Based in Woburn, MA. Call (781) 730-6971 or fill the form — we respond within 4 business hours.

sections.heading: Let's get your business seen.
sections.lede: Tell us about your business and we'll send back a free 20-point Local SEO audit within 2 business days — no pitch, no obligation. Prefer to talk? Call us — we answer within 4 business hours.

sections.heading: Request a free audit
sections.sub: Takes under a minute. We'll reply within 2 business days.
sections.consent: I agree to receive a one-time audit response at the email and phone I provided. AQ Marketing will never sell or share my info.
sections.success_msg: Got it — we'll be in touch within 2 business days.

sections.heading: Common questions before you reach out.

items.q: What happens after I submit the form?
items.a: Within 2 business days you'll get a written 20-point Local SEO audit of your business — your Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, site speed, and top 5 competitor benchmarks. If it looks like a fit, we'll invite you to a 45-minute strategy call. No pitch on the audit itself.

items.q: How much does an engagement cost?
items.a: Most owners start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month (a 12-month agreement) — it bundles the website, Local SEO foundations, hosting and maintenance, CRM, the AI chatbot and AI voice receptionist (per-minute usage fees), reviews, and social. When you're ready to grow faster, you can add accelerators like SEO at $1,299/month or Google Ads management at $1,299/month (ad spend not included). We confirm the exact mix after your free audit.

items.q: Do you only work with Massachusetts businesses?
items.a: We focus on Woburn, Boston, and Greater Boston because we know the market and can visit in person. We take on MA-adjacent clients case by case. If you're outside the Northeast, we'll likely refer you elsewhere.
Yes. No credit card, no strings. We do a handful of free audits each month as part of prospecting. If we're out of slots, we'll let you know within a day.
